task_summaries.task_scope: Analyze dependency structures linking redundant features with class-conditioned packet length and size variations within evidence refs e9 to e22
Evaluate if disentangling redundancies clarifies or amplifies meaningful class-specific packet length and size signals in the preserved feature scope
Check for unstable dependencies that may mask or distort class-conditioned variation in packet length and size features
Assess impact of redundancy disentanglement on interpretability and detection of class patterns in packet length and size features
